setup.protect: Protect yourself from malicious QR codes
setup.privacy: Your API key is stored securely on your device only. URLs are sent to VirusTotal for analysis as per their privacy policy.

scanner.title: Scanner
scanner.pointCamera: Point your camera at a QR code to scan it safely
scanner.tapScanAgain: Tap "Scan Again" to scan another QR code
scanner.cameraMsg: BasiraQr needs camera access to scan QR codes.
scanner.noInternet: ⚠️ No internet connection. Opening URL directly...
scanner.noInternetBanner: No Internet - URLs will open without scanning
scanner.scanningDisabled: URL Scanning is disabled. Opening directly...
scanner.scanningDisabledBanner: URL Scanning Disabled - Links open directly
scanner.scanningDisabledMsg: URLs will open directly without security check
scanner.willOpenDirectly: QR codes will open directly without scanning

results.title: Scan Results
results.safeMessage: This URL appears safe. No security vendors flagged it as malicious.
results.safeAction: You can safely open this link.
results.suspiciousMessage: {positives} out of {total} security vendors flagged this URL. Exercise caution.
results.suspiciousAction: Consider avoiding this link or verify its authenticity first.
results.maliciousMessage: {positives} out of {total} security vendors flagged this as malicious.
results.maliciousAction: Do not visit this link. It may harm your device or steal your data.
results.unknownMessage: This URL was not found in VirusTotal's database.
results.unknownAction: Proceed with caution. Consider the source before visiting.
results.httpWarning: ⚠️ This URL uses HTTP instead of HTTPS, making it less secure

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your BasiraQr preferences
settings.removeKeySubtitle: Remove current API key and reset app
settings.autoBlockSubtitle: Prevent opening URLs flagged as malicious
settings.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for safer QR code scanning
settings.enterNewKey: Enter your new VirusTotal API key. The key will be validated before saving.
settings.pasteKey: Paste your new VirusTotal API key here
settings.getKeyFree: Don't have an API key? Get one free
settings.urlScanningSubtitle: Scan URLs with VirusTotal before opening
settings.urlScanningEnabled: ✅ URL scanning enabled - URLs will be checked
settings.urlScanningDisabled: ⚠️ URL scanning disabled - URLs will open directly

errors.noInternet: No internet connection. Scanning without VirusTotal.
errors.notUrlMessage:
Scanned content: {data}

This QR code doesn't contain a URL.
errors.scanErrorMessage: Failed to process the QR code. Please try again.
errors.invalidApiKeyMessage: The API key you entered is not valid.
errors.validationFailedMessage: Failed to validate the new API key.
errors.removeApiKeyMessage: Are you sure you want to remove your API key? You will need to set it up again to use the app.
errors.apiKeyRemovedMessage: You will be redirected to the setup screen.
errors.clearHistoryMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all scan history?
errors.dangerousUrlMessage: This URL has been flagged as malicious. Are you sure you want to open it?
errors.suspiciousUrlMessage: This URL has been flagged by some security vendors. Proceed with caution.
errors.privacyPolicyMessage:
BasiraQr:

• Stores your API key securely on device
• Sends scanned URLs to VirusTotal for analysis
• Does not collect personal data
• Scan history stays on your device
errors.aboutVTMessage: VirusTotal is a free online service that analyzes URLs and files for malicious content using multiple antivirus engines and security tools.
errors.getApiKeyMessage: Visit virustotal.com to create a free account and get your API key.
errors.enterValidKey: Please enter a valid API key
